Private solar boat cruise experience at Sukhna Lake
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private twilight valley-view dining and customized historical walks

itinerary.title: Chandigarh & Kasauli Hills Escape
itinerary.tagline: The Urban Masterpiece Meet Sublime Alpine Serenity
itinerary.overview:
Experience a perfectly orchestrated transition from urban architectural luxury to serene alpine grandeur with the Premium Chandigarh Experience curated by TRAGUIN travel specialists. This hand-tailored luxury holiday brings together the structural elegance of Chandigarh and the colonial timeless charm of Kasauli Hills.

Travel Setup: Fully Private Customized Leisure Tour (FIT). Vehicle Allocation: Luxury Premium Sedan / SUV (Innova Crysta). Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Daily Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Dinner). TRAGUIN Curated Experience Note: VIP access entry at key sites, private candlelit dinner option in Kasauli.
itinerary.seo_title: CH-018 | Chandigarh & Kasauli Hills Escape | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days package (CH-018 / TG-CH-018-PREM): Sukhna Lake solar boat cruise, Rock Garden, Kasauli Heritage Mall Road, Gilbert Trail, Manki Point, and split-stay hotels.

highlights.text: Sukhna Lake Private Sunset Boat Cruise
Nek Chand Rock Garden & Rose Garden
Kasauli Heritage Mall Road & Christ Church

days.title: Arrival in Chandigarh & Sukhna Lake Luxury Cruise
days.description: Welcome to the City of Joy and structural perfection. Arrive at Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station, where your dedicated TRAGUIN luxury chauffeur awaits. After a smooth check-in, begin your exploration with a visit to the iconic Sukhna Lake. We have curated an exclusive private solar boat cruise for you during sunset.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sukhna Lake Promenade & Waterfront Walk
Evening Experience: Private Sunset Boat Cruise Experience
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: Gourmet Welcome Dinner

days.title: Revealing Architectural Wonders & Rose Garden Balm
days.description: Savor a lavish morning buffet breakfast before venturing out to see the finest landmarks of Chandigarh Sightseeing at Nek Chand's famous Rock Garden and the Zakir Hussain Rose Garden. In the afternoon, explore the architectural landmarks of the Capitol Complex or enjoy premium high-street shopping at Sector 17 Plaza.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nek Chand Rock Garden, Rose Garden, Sector 17 Architectural Tour
Photography Points: Recycled sculpture galleries, blooming rose beds
Overnight Stay: Chandigarh
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Journey to Kasauli Hills & Colonial Mall Road Walks
days.description: Bid adieu to the plains as we take a smooth, winding, scenic drive upward into the crisp mountain air of Kasauli Hills. Upon arrival in Kasauli, check into your ultra-premium boutique resort. In the afternoon, take a leisurely stroll down the historic colonial Heritage Mall Road and visit the neo-gothic Christ Church.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Heritage Mall Road, Colonial Christ Church Walk
Evening Experience: Mountain tea-tasting & bonfire at your resort
Overnight Stay: Kasauli Hills (Luxury Valley-View Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Valley-view Dinner

days.title: Hiking Gilbert Trail & Panoramic Manki Point View
days.description: Awake to the birds singing and a magnificent sunrise cutting through the mountain mist. We begin with the famous Gilbert Trail, a short, flat, yet highly scenic nature walk along a cliff edge. Later, we drive up to the historical Manki Point, the highest point in Kasauli. Spend your final evening enjoying an exclusive, curated dinner setup beneath the stars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gilbert Trail Nature Walk, Manki Point Lookout
Exclusive Recommendation: Sip traditional hot Himachali apple cider
Overnight Stay: Kasauli Hills
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Candlelit Farewell Dinner

days.title: Farewell to the Hills & Departure from Chandigarh
days.description: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast on the terrace deck of your resort. Your TRAGUIN luxury transport will pick you up for a smooth downhill drive back to Chandigarh, delivering you comfortably to Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station for your return flight home.
activities: Sightseeing Included: En-route scenic photo stops in Pinjore Valley
Assistance: Complete baggage handling and airport gate drop-off
Overnight Stay: Tour Concludes
Meals Included: Hearty Buffet Breakfast

hotels.name: Hotel Hyatt Regency / Lemon Tree | Kasauli Exotica / Fortune Resort
Taj Chandigarh (Superior Room) | The Fern Surya Resort / Rosetum

The Oberoi Sukhvilas Spa Resort | TRAGUIN Private Elite Villas & Spas

inclusions.text: 02 Nights in Chandigarh & 02 Nights in Kasauli at handpicked premium hotels
Daily multi-cuisine buffet breakfast and curated chef-crafted dinners
Dedicated private luxury Innova Crysta for all transfers and tours
Private solar boat cruise experience at Sukhna Lake
All monument entry passes, parking fees, highway tolls, and driver allowances
Complimentary welcome amenities, fresh seasonal fruits, and mineral water bottles
Inter-state flights or railway tickets to Chandigarh
Personal items such as laundry, phone charges, or liquor
Additional adventure sports, paragliding, or porter tips
Medical insurance and items not declared in the inclusions
